Indianapolis · Hands-On Tech & AI

Train for a career in AI, Cyber & IT — and get paid to do it.

Hope Training Academy is a nonprofit where you learn by doing — in a real, high-tech lab. Since 2018, training is free for those who qualify. Earn while you learn through a U.S. Department of Labor–Registered Apprenticeship. No degree, no experience required.

Register today → For Employers

Live · In person & online · Hands-on

Learn hands-on — in person or online.

The best way to learn tech is to do it. Take a class in person at our Indianapolis lab — real instructors, real hardware, real projects — or join us online from anywhere. New courses open regularly, and seats are limited.

See our courses →Visit the lab

What you'll master

Four skills. One hands-on method.

Every track is taught the HTA way — in a real, high-tech lab, building real things — and every path can lead into a paid, registered apprenticeship.

Today's emphasis

AI

Find your place in the AI world. Hands-on with OpenAI, Claude & Gemini — learn to use them all to launch a career.

The flagship

Cybersecurity

Pre-Apprenticeship to Analyst. CompTIA Security+, real labs, real salary ranges.

The on-ramp

IT & Help Desk

Desktop support & foundations — no experience needed. Build and repair real machines.

The craft

Coding

Python from the ground up — build real projects and data skills, not slideware.

The HTA difference

A real, registered path — beginner to hired.

No competitor stacks this: three U.S. Department of Labor–Registered Apprenticeships — held since 2018 — with a beginner on-ramp. You earn while you learn and finish with a nationally-recognized, portable credential.

IT

IT Support

Registered since 2018

→ earning while learning▊
Experiential learning

Our biggest thing: you learn by doing.

Founded and led by a technologist who came up in the field, HTA runs on one belief: people learn tech by touching it. Students build machines, secure real networks, and ship real projects — in a working lab, with mentors beside them.

✓
Real labs, real hardware — not slideware or passive video.
✓
Founder-designed curriculum — built on what employers actually hire for.
✓
Certified & placed — earn industry certs, then step into an apprenticeship.
For employers

Build your tech team two ways.

HTA is a talent partner for Indiana businesses — grow the people you have, or hire people who are ready on day one.

01 / TRAIN

Upskill your team

Corporate training in AI, cybersecurity and IT — practical, hands-on, built around your stack. Turn your staff into your AI-ready workforce.

02 / HIRE

Hire our apprentices

A screened, job-ready pipeline through registered apprenticeships — tax credits, strong retention, simple partner process. Try-before-you-hire, no placement fee.

Partner with us →
Real students, real outcomes

Changing lives across Indianapolis.

From our Union Campus in downtown Indianapolis to partnerships with the Indianapolis Urban League and IU's Luddy School — this is what hands-on hope looks like.

Curated real photos + video testimonials wire in from HTA's archive (128+ images) and the YouTube channel.

Fuel the mission

Every dollar puts a Hoosier to work.

HTA is a mission-driven nonprofit — donations fund scholarships, equipment and access for students who qualify. Your support funds lab equipment, instructors, certifications, and apprenticeships that change lives and strengthen Indiana's workforce.

A 501(c)(3) charity

Hope Training Academy operates under Video Game Palooza, Inc., a 100% nonprofit 501(c)(3). Contributions are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law.
